wrong.verdict_message: The Vitals chunk is the primary driver (logit push=+2.02 toward disease). Ghost Signal 'Demographics→Vitals' is anomalously active (α=0.009 (z=+2.19 vs population), magnitude z=2.83) and is pushing toward disease (force=+0.000). Patient demographics (age/sex/cp) over-influenced the cardiovascular vitals interpretation, biasing the prediction pathway.

The Vitals chunk is the primary driver (logit push=-2.42 away from disease). Ghost Signal 'LabDiag→Structural' is anomalously active (α=0.828 (z=+1.84 vs population), magnitude z=1.66) and is pushing toward disease (force=+5.790). Lab diagnostic signals (fbs/restecg/slope) abnormally coupled with structural findings (ca/thal), amplifying structural risk indicators.
